companion_screenshot: docs/probes/control + carry/rrh control.jpg (Battle Records damage screen)
processor_notes: Measurement-only pass. Focused unit = Rapi: Red Hood (all popups are hers). Control team, neutral element.

video.segments: single continuous fight; AMBUSH/boss-reveal ~7-9s, combat to ~190s, OPERATION CLEAR ~190-192s

damage_screen.team_total_check: 470516754+213881837+899555690+477724348 = 2061678629 (matches OPERATION CLEAR + final in-fight counter exactly)
damage_screen.note_atk: ATK values are Battle-Records ATK (lv400), NOT combat/scope-lock ATK (~118-120k).

boss.type: quadruped/spider mech raid boss, glowing blue core, multiple destructible parts (observed 2 parts simultaneously e.g. 068% / 072%; parts/phases reset HP to 100%)
boss.element: NOT explicitly readable in-frame (no clear element glyph on boss nameplate/HP bar)
boss.neutral_confirmation: Consistent with NEUTRAL for Rapi (Fire): no elemental-advantage boost indicator observed on any of Rapi's popups. Rapi(Fire) has advantage only vs Wind, so boss != Wind. Owner-declared neutral control recording; nothing observed contradicts it.

full_bursts.method: yellow FULL-BURST-splash luminance/color spike detection on 8fps 16x16 RGB timeseries, verified by reading 'FULL BURST!' banner at t=43.75 and t=72.1
full_bursts.interval_note: very regular ~14s cadence; no intermediate/irregular splashes found at lowered threshold, so 13 is believed complete

red_rocket_meter.finding: The red '%' box to the RIGHT of the crosshair is BOSS HP (labeled 'DRL ROY'), NOT the rocket meter. Early spawn intro animates the boss HP bar 0->100% (read 001->006->025->070% at t=9-12) which mimics a filling meter; in combat it reads 097->095->094%... (decreasing).
red_rocket_meter.candidate_rocket_gauge: a small yellow RADIAL ARC around the reticle circle grows over time and may be the actual rocket-charge gauge, plus a 'SYD-08 READY' red banner that flashes when a rocket is ready. Neither is reliably countable across cluttered combat.
red_rocket_meter.left_crosshair_counter: a white countdown-style box (max ~299-300) that decreases and resets; depletes ~35/s OUTSIDE her Full Burst vs ~54-59/s INSIDE her Full Burst (~1.6-1.7x faster). Likely her ammo; its ~2x-in-burst depletion is consistent with the owner's 2x in-burst fire/charge rate (120 outside / 60 inside), but its ~300 scale does not map cleanly to the sim's per-120-attacks assumption.
red_rocket_meter.shots_per_fill_outside: NOT directly measurable (individual shots fire too fast to count; no clean 0-100 fill box isolable)
red_rocket_meter.verdict_on_120_60_assumption: Indirectly supported only: fire/charge rate roughly doubles inside her Full Burst. Exact shots-per-rocket unverified from this footage.

explosion_instances_per_fb.finding: NOT cleanly resolvable. The accumulated-rocket BATCH explodes in the first ~0.2-0.3s of each Full Burst, exactly coincident with the FULL BURST yellow splash, and its popups overlap each other AND the normal-fire popup stack into an inseparable cluster (matches owner's warning that visual explosion-counting fails).

large_bodies_seen_at_fb_start.note: at reticle center inside a red radial explosion effect
top of an overlapping stacked cluster

explosion_popups.value_estimate: explosion-class bodies ~1.5-2.3M observed (below owner's ~4.5M expectation; likely partial reads / DEF-reduced / single-instance vs batch ambiguity)
explosion_popups.core_fraction: UNRESOLVED. The confidently RED 'CORE HIT'-labeled popups were the NORMAL shots, not the big explosion bodies (which read white/plain in the frames captured). Cannot confirm nor deny that explosions core from this footage.

normal_fire_popups_rapi.note: Rapi's normal AR shots VISIBLY CORE (red 'CORE HIT' label confirmed).
normal_fire_popups_rapi.recurring_core_values: ~83,708 and ~93,753 (core, non-crit); crit-core ~101,449 (early) rising to ~110,494 (mid-fight as buffs ramp)

counter_reconciliation.limitation: The top 'DAMAGE' counter is TEAM-TOTAL (equals sum of all 4 units at fight end), NOT Rapi-only. Deltas across a Full Burst therefore cannot isolate Rapi's explosion batch.
counter_reconciliation.fb6_batch_window_delta: t85.4->86.5 (1.1s, spans FB6 start/batch): team +7,652,161 (team-total, not attributable to Rapi's batch alone)

burst_nuke.finding: NOT cleanly isolable. Rapi's burst-skill ('Power of Inheritance' banner seen ~t15) launches a flighted missile ~0.4s after the banner, but its impact popup lands inside the same FB-start batch/splash cluster and cannot be separated from the accumulated-rocket explosions.

recommendation: This footage strongly validates recording-wishlist #1: an ISOLATED single-explosion-batch, slow-mo / frame-step recording is required to pin the projectile-explosion per-instance value, core fraction, and true instances/FB. In normal play the batch overlaps the FULL BURST splash and the normal-popup stack and is unreadable.
